---
title: "Workout data"
format: 
  dashboard:
    theme:
      light: [litera, custom.scss]
      dark: [darkly, custom.scss]
    scrolling: true
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link rel="icon" href="favicon.svg" type="image/svg+xml">
        <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
        <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Outfit:wght@400;500&family=Inter:wght@400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    nav-buttons:
      - icon: envelope
        href: mailto:teromeh@proton.me
      - icon: house-door
        href: ../
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
library(plotly)
library(dplyr)

data <- readRDS("workout-history.rds")

title_font <- list(family = "Outfit, sans-serif", size = 14, color = "#1a1a1a")

activity_counts <- data |>
  count(activity_type, name = "maara") |>
  mutate(percentage = round(maara / sum(maara) * 100, 1))

distance_counts <- data |>
  count(distance_class, name = "maara") |>
  mutate(percentage = round(maara / sum(maara) * 100, 1))
```

## Row

### Column

```{r}
#| label: activity-types
plot_ly(activity_counts,
        labels = ~activity_type,
        values = ~maara,
        type = "pie",
        hole = 0.6,
        marker = list(colors = c("#00BCD4", "#D81B60")),
        textinfo = "label+percent",
        textfont = list(family = "Inter, sans-serif", size = 14, color = "#1a1a1a"),
        hovertext = ~paste0(activity_type, ": ", maara, " workouts"),
        hoverinfo = "text") |>
  layout(
    title = list(text = "<b>Activity Types</b>", font = title_font, x = 0),
    showlegend = FALSE,
    hoverlabel = list(
      bgcolor = "#333333",
      bordercolor = "#333333",
      font = list(color = "#ffffff", family = "Inter, sans-serif", size = 13)
    ),
    paper_bgcolor = "white",
    plot_bgcolor = "white"
  ) |>
  config(displayModeBar = FALSE)
```
## Row

### Column

```{r}
#| label: distance-classes
plot_ly(distance_counts,
        labels = ~distance_class,
        values = ~maara,
        type = "pie",
        hole = 0.6,
        marker = list(colors = c("#00BCD4", "#0097A7", "#D81B60", "#AD1457")),
        textinfo = "label+percent",
        textfont = list(family = "Inter, sans-serif", size = 13, color = "#1a1a1a"),
        hovertext = ~paste0(distance_class, ": ", maara, " workouts"),
        hoverinfo = "text") |>
  layout(
    title = list(text = "<b>Distance Distribution</b>", font = title_font, x = 0),
    showlegend = FALSE,
    hoverlabel = list(
      bgcolor = "#333333",
      bordercolor = "#333333",
      font = list(color = "#ffffff", family = "Inter, sans-serif", size = 13)
    ),
    paper_bgcolor = "white",
    plot_bgcolor = "white"
  ) |>
  config(displayModeBar = FALSE)
```
